scene: Teen Byte sits at the desk during evening hours with dimmed purple-blue lighting and visible city lights through the Chicago window, displaying energetic ecstatic posture while the food bowl shows noticeably low kibble levels

subjects.position: centered at desk facing the oversized laptop
subjects.action: sitting upright with energetic ecstatic posture, bright attentive expression, slight hint of hunger awareness

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
